[usb] pm3 --> hf search -h
Will try to find a HF read out of the unknown tag.

usage:
    hf search [-hv]

options:
    -h, --help                     This help
    -v, --verbose                  verbose output

[usb] pm3 --> lf search -h
Read and search for valid known tag. For offline mode, you can `data load` first then search.

usage:
    lf search [-h1cu]

options:
    -h, --help                     This help
    -u                             Search for unknown tags

[usb] pm3 --> lf hitag hts
help             This help
list             List Hitag S trace history
rdbl             Read Hitag S page
dump             Dump Hitag S pages to a file
restore          Restore Hitag S memory from dump file
wrbl             Write Hitag S page
sim              Simulate Hitag S transponder

[usb] pm3 --> lf hitag hts rdbl -h
Read Hitag S page.

usage:
    lf hitag hts rdbl [-h8] [--nrar <hex>] [--crypto] [-k <hex>] [-m <0|1|2|3>] [-p <dec>] [-c <dec>]

options:
    -h, --help                     This help

[usb] pm3 --> lf hitag hts wrbl -h
Write Hitag S page.

usage:
    lf hitag hts wrbl [-h8] [--nrar <hex>] [--crypto] [-k <hex>] [-m <dec>] -p <dec> -d <hex>

options:
    -h, --help                     This help

[usb] pm3 --> lf hitag hts dump -h
Dump Hitag S pages to a file.

usage:
    lf hitag hts dump [-h8] [--nrar <hex>] [--crypto] [-k <hex>] [-m <dec>] [-f <fn>] [--ns]

options:
    -h, --help                     This help
